_comment: external-agents config. The caller picks ONE effort level (low|medium|high|xhigh) and each agent's tier maps it to the right (model, native effort). 'enabled' agents run under `--agent all`. With no --effort, default_tier is used. agy and cursor bake the tier into the model name and ignore 'effort'; codex/claude take model + effort separately. The cursor agent's CLI binary is `cursor-agent`; run `cursor-agent models` (once logged in) for its exact --model identifiers. NOTE: cursor tiers deliberately pin the NON-fast `composer-2.5` — Cursor's own CLI default is `composer-2.5-fast`, a `-fast` variant that spends fast/priority requests; keep the plain (non-`-fast`) id to avoid burning fast requests. Read by scripts/run-agent.sh via jq (preferred) or python3. See README.md.
